metadata.title: Costa Bella – Beachside Condominiums for Sale in Rosarito, Baja California
metadata.description: Costa Bella offers coastal condominiums in the northern Baja corridor near Rosarito. Steps from the Pacific Ocean, ideal for vacation homes or permanent residence in Baja California.

hero.subtitle: A limited collection of only 16 luxury condominiums designed for those who seek coastal elegance.

amenities.label: Pool
amenities.title: Rooftop pool with panoramic Pacific views.
amenities.description: Resort-style rooftop pool with sun deck and lounging areas, overlooking the Pacific Ocean. The perfect setting to unwind just steps from the beach in Rosarito.

amenities.label: Terrace
amenities.title: Private terraces with breathtaking ocean views.
amenities.description: Expansive terraces designed for outdoor living — enjoy sunrises over the Pacific and Rosarito's coastline from the comfort of your own home.

amenities.label: Gym
amenities.title: Fully equipped fitness center.
amenities.description: State-of-the-art gym with premium equipment, natural light, and sweeping views of the Pacific. Stay active without leaving the comfort of your building.

amenities.label: Kitchen
amenities.title: Designer kitchens with premium finishes.
amenities.description: Integral kitchens with marble countertops, high-end appliances, and clean modern lines — designed to inspire every meal with a Pacific backdrop.

amenities.label: Bedroom
amenities.title: Spacious bedrooms with walk-in closets.
amenities.description: Thoughtfully designed bedrooms with direct terrace access, walk-in closets, and premium finishes that bring coastal elegance to every corner of your home.

features: Primary bedroom with full bathroom and walk-in closet
Secondary bedroom with closet and shared full bathroom
Primary bedroom with full bathroom and walk-in closet
Secondary bedroom with shared full bathroom

cta.body: Designed for those who seek more than just a residence, these 16 exclusive condominiums offer refined coastal living, breathtaking Pacific views, and a private community unlike any other. Every home delivers comfort, elegance, and lasting value just steps from the beach. Contact us today to reserve your place in this exceptional development.
